headline: FICA Overpaid Tax Recovery Software Preparation Checklist — Las Vegas
articleBody:
FICA Overpaid Tax Recovery Software Preparation Checklist for Las Vegas Clients

Before your FICA Overpaid Tax Recovery Software appointment with Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credit Specialists at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
